2	import type RenderResult from '../../render-result'
3	import type { RenderOpts } from '../../app-render/types'
4	import { addRequestMeta, type NextParsedUrlQuery } from '../../request-meta'
5	import type { LoaderTree } from '../../lib/app-dir-module'
6	import type { PrerenderManifest } from '../../../build'
7	
8	import {
9	  renderToHTMLOrFlight,
10	  type AppSharedContext,
11	} from '../../app-render/app-render'
12	import {
13	  RouteModule,
14	  type RouteModuleOptions,
15	  type RouteModuleHandleContext,
16	} from '../route-module'
17	import * as vendoredContexts from './vendored/contexts/entrypoints'
18	import type { BaseNextRequest, BaseNextResponse } from '../../base-http'
19	import type { ServerComponentsHmrCache } from '../../response-cache'
20	import type { OpaqueFallbackRouteParams } from '../../request/fallback-params'
21	import { PrerenderManifestMatcher } from './helpers/prerender-manifest-matcher'
22	import type { DeepReadonly } from '../../../shared/lib/deep-readonly'
23	import {
24	  NEXT_ROUTER_PREFETCH_HEADER,
25	  NEXT_ROUTER_SEGMENT_PREFETCH_HEADER,
26	  NEXT_ROUTER_STATE_TREE_HEADER,
27	  NEXT_URL,
28	  RSC_HEADER,
29	} from '../../../client/components/app-router-headers'
30	import { isInterceptionRouteAppPath } from '../../../shared/lib/router/utils/interception-routes'
31	import { RSCPathnameNormalizer } from '../../normalizers/request/rsc'
32	import { SegmentPrefixRSCPathnameNormalizer } from '../../normalizers/request/segment-prefix-rsc'
33	import type { UrlWithParsedQuery } from 'url'
34	import type { IncomingMessage } from 'http'
35	import {
36	  applyAppPageRscRequestMetaFromHeaders,
37	  normalizeAppPageRequestUrl,
38	} from './normalize-request-url'
39	
40	let vendoredReactRSC
41	let vendoredReactSSR
42	
43	// the vendored Reacts are loaded from their original source in the edge runtime
44	if (process.env.NEXT_RUNTIME !== 'edge') {
45	  vendoredReactRSC =
46	    require('./vendored/rsc/entrypoints') as typeof import('./vendored/rsc/entrypoints')
47	  vendoredReactSSR =
48	    require('./vendored/ssr/entrypoints') as typeof import('./vendored/ssr/entrypoints')
49	
50	  // In Node environments we need to access the correct React instance from external modules such
51	  // as global patches. We register the loaded React instances here.
52	  const { registerServerReact, registerClientReact } =
53	    require('../../runtime-reacts.external') as typeof import('../../runtime-reacts.external')
54	  registerServerReact(vendoredReactRSC.React)
55	  registerClientReact(vendoredReactSSR.React)
56	}
57	
58	/**
59	 * The AppPageModule is the type of the module exported by the bundled app page
60	 * module.
61	 */
62	export type AppPageModule = typeof import('../../../build/templates/app-page')
63	
64	type AppPageUserlandModule = {
65	  /**
66	   * The tree created in next-app-loader that holds component segments and modules
67	   */
68	  loaderTree: LoaderTree
69	}
70	
71	export interface AppPageRouteHandlerContext extends RouteModuleHandleContext {
72	  page: string
73	  query: NextParsedUrlQuery
74	  fallbackRouteParams: OpaqueFallbackRouteParams | null
75	  renderOpts: RenderOpts
76	  serverComponentsHmrCache?: ServerComponentsHmrCache
77	  sharedContext: AppSharedContext
78	}
79	
80	export type AppPageRouteModuleOptions = RouteModuleOptions<
81	  AppPageRouteDefinition,
82	  AppPageUserlandModule
83	>
84	
85	export class AppPageRouteModule extends RouteModule<
86	  AppPageRouteDefinition,
87	  AppPageUserlandModule
88	> {
89	  private matchers = new WeakMap<
90	    DeepReadonly<PrerenderManifest>,
91	    PrerenderManifestMatcher
92	  >()
93	  public match(
94	    pathname: string,
95	    prerenderManifest: DeepReadonly<PrerenderManifest>
96	  ) {
97	    // Lazily create the matcher based on the provided prerender manifest.
98	    let matcher = this.matchers.get(prerenderManifest)
99	    if (!matcher) {
100	      matcher = new PrerenderManifestMatcher(
101	        this.definition.pathname,
102	        prerenderManifest
103	      )
104	      this.matchers.set(prerenderManifest, matcher)
105	    }
106	
107	    // Match the pathname to the dynamic route.
108	    return matcher.match(pathname)
109	  }
110	
111	  private normalizers = {
112	    rsc: new RSCPathnameNormalizer(),
113	    segmentPrefetchRSC: new SegmentPrefixRSCPathnameNormalizer(),
114	  }
115	
116	  public normalizeUrl(
117	    req: IncomingMessage | BaseNextRequest,
118	    parsedUrl: UrlWithParsedQuery
119	  ) {
120	    if (this.normalizers.segmentPrefetchRSC.match(parsedUrl.pathname || '/')) {
121	      const result = this.normalizers.segmentPrefetchRSC.extract(
122	        parsedUrl.pathname || '/'
123	      )
124	      if (!result) return false
125	
126	      const { originalPathname, segmentPath } = result
127	      parsedUrl.pathname = originalPathname
128	
129	      // Mark the request as a router prefetch request.
130	      req.headers[RSC_HEADER] = '1'
131	      req.headers[NEXT_ROUTER_PREFETCH_HEADER] = '1'
132	      req.headers[NEXT_ROUTER_SEGMENT_PREFETCH_HEADER] = segmentPath
133	
134	      addRequestMeta(req, 'isRSCRequest', true)
135	      addRequestMeta(req, 'isPrefetchRSCRequest', true)
136	      addRequestMeta(req, 'segmentPrefetchRSCRequest', segmentPath)
137	    } else if (this.normalizers.rsc.match(parsedUrl.pathname || '/')) {
138	      parsedUrl.pathname = this.normalizers.rsc.normalize(
139	        parsedUrl.pathname || '/',
140	        true
141	      )
142	
143	      // Mark the request as a RSC request.
144	      req.headers[RSC_HEADER] = '1'
145	    } else {
146	      super.normalizeUrl(req, parsedUrl)
147	    }
148	
149	    // Minimal adapters can bypass base-server request normalization and invoke
150	    // route modules directly, so derive RSC/prefetch metadata from headers.
151	    applyAppPageRscRequestMetaFromHeaders(req)
152	    normalizeAppPageRequestUrl(req, parsedUrl.pathname || '/')
153	  }
154	
155	  public render(
156	    req: BaseNextRequest,
157	    res: BaseNextResponse,
158	    context: AppPageRouteHandlerContext
159	  ): Promise<RenderResult> {
160	    return renderToHTMLOrFlight(
161	      req,
162	      res,
163	      context.page,
164	      context.query,
165	      context.fallbackRouteParams,
166	      context.renderOpts,
167	      context.serverComponentsHmrCache,
168	      context.sharedContext
169	    )
170	  }
171	
172	  private pathCouldBeIntercepted(
173	    resolvedPathname: string,
174	    interceptionRoutePatterns: RegExp[]
175	  ): boolean {
176	    return (
177	      isInterceptionRouteAppPath(resolvedPathname) ||
178	      interceptionRoutePatterns.some((regexp) => {
179	        return regexp.test(resolvedPathname)
180	      })
181	    )
182	  }
183	
184	  public getVaryHeader(
185	    resolvedPathname: string,
186	    interceptionRoutePatterns: RegExp[]
187	  ): string {
188	    const baseVaryHeader = `${RSC_HEADER}, ${NEXT_ROUTER_STATE_TREE_HEADER}, ${NEXT_ROUTER_PREFETCH_HEADER}, ${NEXT_ROUTER_SEGMENT_PREFETCH_HEADER}`
189	
190	    if (
191	      this.pathCouldBeIntercepted(resolvedPathname, interceptionRoutePatterns)
192	    ) {
193	      // Interception route responses can vary based on the `Next-URL` header.
194	      // We use the Vary header to signal this behavior to the client to properly cache the response.
195	      return `${baseVaryHeader}, ${NEXT_URL}`
196	    } else {
197	      // We don't need to include `Next-URL` in the Vary header for non-interception routes since it won't affect the response.
198	      // We also set this header for pages to avoid caching issues when navigating between pages and app.
199	      return baseVaryHeader
200	    }
201	  }
202	}
203	
204	const vendored = {
205	  'react-rsc': vendoredReactRSC,
206	  'react-ssr': vendoredReactSSR,
207	  contexts: vendoredContexts,
208	}
209	
210	export { renderToHTMLOrFlight, vendored }
211	
212	export default AppPageRouteModule

1998	    req: ServerRequest,
1999	    res: ServerResponse,
2000	    isAppPath: boolean,
2001	    resolvedPathname: string
2002	  ): void {
2003	    const baseVaryHeader = `${RSC_HEADER}, ${NEXT_ROUTER_STATE_TREE_HEADER}, ${NEXT_ROUTER_PREFETCH_HEADER}, ${NEXT_ROUTER_SEGMENT_PREFETCH_HEADER}`
2004	    const isRSCRequest = getRequestMeta(req, 'isRSCRequest') ?? false
2005	
2006	    let addedNextUrlToVary = false
2007	
2008	    if (isAppPath && this.pathCouldBeIntercepted(resolvedPathname)) {
2009	      // Interception route responses can vary based on the `Next-URL` header.
2010	      // We use the Vary header to signal this behavior to the client to properly cache the response.
2011	      res.appendHeader('vary', `${baseVaryHeader}, ${NEXT_URL}`)
2012	      addedNextUrlToVary = true
2013	    } else if (isAppPath || isRSCRequest) {
2014	      // We don't need to include `Next-URL` in the Vary header for non-interception routes since it won't affect the response.
2015	      // We also set this header for pages to avoid caching issues when navigating between pages and app.
2016	      res.appendHeader('vary', baseVaryHeader)
2017	    }
2018	
2019	    if (!addedNextUrlToVary) {
2020	      // Remove `Next-URL` from the request headers we determined it wasn't necessary to include in the Vary header.
2021	      // This is to avoid any dependency on the `Next-URL` header being present when preparing the response.
2022	      delete req.headers[NEXT_URL]
2023	    }
2024	  }
